title: Crouse Health EAP Agreement for Firefighter Counseling, Critical Incident Stress, and Behavioral Health
summary: Two-year agreement with Crouse Health Hospital for fire-department-specific EAP services including confidential counseling, critical incident stress debriefing, and supervisor consultation. Part of three-prong behavioral health program (EAP, critical incident stress, peer support) distinct from citywide ENI program. Fire department previously used Crouse before citywide transition and needs fire-specific services again. Council requests firefighter-specific usage data.

political_signal.description: Fire Chief and multiple council members strongly advocate for specialized first responder mental health services separate from citywide EAP
